libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For nativeTest/native-image runs on JDK 25, set runtime system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` for 5.0.1 as well. Tests can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server on `127.0.0.1`; no external service is required. Ensure WebClient, HttpServer, and Vertx instances are closed to avoid event-loop/resource leaks.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact exposes OAuth2WebClient classes while `io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2` is optional; avoid OAuth2-specific coverage unless the test intentionally adds that dependency.
The failure is in native-image runtime, so local Gradle/native verification remains authoritative for whether the system-property guidance is sufficient.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 is usable with its normal transitive dependencies and a local loopback HTTP server, but its Netty 4.2.2.Final runtime needs the same Java 25 native-image runtime system properties already used for 5.0.0.
